meta.name: Richard PERRET
meta.title: Software Engineer
meta.tagline: I build software that solves real problems. When I'm not coding, I'm probably running or training for my next challenge.

projects.title: Agentic AI Platform
projects.description: An AI assistant platform that reasons, searches and acts autonomously in real time. It streams its thinking live, pulls answers from your Google Docs via semantic search, and runs multiple tools in parallel, all through a clean trilingual interface (FR/EN/ES).

projects.title: Arya
projects.description: A mobile app I built to coach myself and others, whatever the sport. You set your goals, follow tailored workouts, track your metrics and watch your progression over time. Works on both iOS and Android.

projects.title: Portail & Reference
projects.description: The backbone of the company's information system, built over three years. Portail is the web app where teams manage projects, contracts, billing, HR and support, with each role seeing exactly what it needs. Reference is the REST API behind it all, serving every internal tool. I focused heavily on performance (caching, query optimization) and code quality (typing, tests, security scans).
